repos_pt:
[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) Programa em Rust para montar arquivos markdown para diversas línguas. Para a versão em Python acesse: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[blog-posts](https://github.com/caiocampos/blog-posts) Página de postagens usando React, NestJS (Express) e MongoDB (Mongoose)

[Rust-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Rust-Random-Stuff) Projetos variados em Rust
repos_en:
[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) Rust program to mount markdown files for various languages. For Python version access: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[blog-posts](https://github.com/caiocampos/blog-posts) Post page using React, NestJS (Express) and MongoDB (Mongoose)

[Rust-Random-Stuff](https://github.com/caiocampos/Rust-Random-Stuff) Miscellaneous projects in Rust
repos_es:
[md-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse) Programa en Rust para montar archivos markdown para diversas lenguas. Para la versión de Python visite: https://github.com/caiocampos/md-fuse-py

[blog-posts](https://github.com/caiocampos/blog-posts) Página de posts usando React, NestJS (Express) y MongoDB (Mongoose)
